title: Pistachio and Puff Pastry Delight
description: A sweet pastry dessert featuring a delicate pastry crust, a delicious pistachio filling, and topped with a layer of crunchy puff pastry.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer the pastry to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a medium bowl, mix together the pistachio paste and granulated sugar.
Spread the pistachio mixture evenly over the pastry.
Roll out the delicate pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut the pastry into strips, about 1 inch wide.
Place the pastry strips on top of the pistachio mixture, weaving them into a lattice pattern.
Brush the pastry with the beaten egg and melted butter.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
